title: Avoid Instantiation of Primitive Wrappers for 'toString' or 'compareTo' calls
description: Creating temporary primitive wrapper objects only for 'String' conversion or the use of the 'compareTo()' method is inefficient. Instead, use the static 'toString()' or 'compare()' method of the primitive wrapper class. This rule helps to improve the code efficiency by avoiding unnecessary object creation.
recommendation: Replace the instantiation of primitive wrappers with the static 'toString()' or 'compare()' method of the respective primitive wrapper class.
impact: Improves code performance by avoiding unnecessary object creation.

checks.message: Avoid Instantiation of Primitive Wrappers for 'toString' or 'compareTo' calls
